detail.description:
▶ A special opportunity to personally select and acquire Legend, Franchise, and Monster grade players!

Meet the legendary teams and legendary players again in 2026 Pro Baseball GO!

A new baseball experience that reinterprets iconic moments from KBO League history and Newtro sensibilities in a modern style.

Start playing idle × collect × communicative baseball now—easy to raise, comfortable to enjoy, and growing together with the fans!

🎉 1. Equipped with the official KBO license!

Fully refl
